zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle De BRIENNE於1196年出生時，她的父親Gauthier de Brienne III30歲，母親Maria Albiria de Sicile16歲。她與Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1307年11月9日在法國享年111歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle De BRIENNE于1196年出生时，她的父亲Gauthier de Brienne III30岁，母亲Maria Albiria de Sicile16岁。她与Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1307年11月9日在法国享年111岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle De BRIENNE was born in 1196, her father, Gauthier de Brienne III, was 30 and her mother, Maria Albiria de Sicile, was 16. She married Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 9 November 1307, in France, at the age of 111.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle De BRIENNE est née en 1196, son père, Gauthier de Brienne III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maria Albiria de Sicile, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1307, à France, à l’âge de 111 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle De BRIENNE 1196 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gauthier de Brienne III 30 und ihre Mutter Maria Albiria de Sicile 16. Sie hat Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 9. November 1307 im Alter von 111 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle De BRIENNE è nata il nel 1196, sua padre, Gauthier de Brienne III, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Maria Albiria de Sicile, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 9 novembre 1307, nel Francia, all'età di 111 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle De BRIENNEが1196年に生まれた時，父Gauthier de Brienne IIIは30歳，母Maria Albiria de Sicileは16歳であった。Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempréと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1307年11月9日にフランスで111歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle De BRIENNE(이)가 1196년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gauthier de Brienne III(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Albiria de Sicile(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 11월 9일 프랑스에서 111세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1262: de 8 de janeiro de 1262 a 7 de janeiro de 1263
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle De BRIENNE nasceu em 1196, seu pai, Gauthier de Brienne III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maria Albiria de Sicile, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1307, em França, com 111 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle De BRIENNE родилась в 1196 г., её отцу по имени Gauthier de Brienne III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Albiria de Sicile, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 9 ноября 1307 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 111 год.

Se casó con Chevalier Alexandre de Rubempré. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1307, en Francia, a la edad de 111 años.
